title: Chapter 180

Chapter 179

If it were a commoner, such as Rayla or anyone else, they would have just followed through, without feeling anything apparent, according to this world.

But this play was only possible when one felt humiliation mixed with arousal. In the case of nobles, there would be no arousal, only humiliation, and in the case of commoners, there would be nothing at all.

This unique combination was only possible because it was Zara.

She raised her head and looked at me, confusion in her eyes.

“Stay like that. You have to walk like that.” I said.

“H-how can I walk like this?” She couldn’t even tell what I was telling her to do.

“By crawling, Zara. On your hands and knees. Crawl.”

Saying it twice finally got to her, and her eyes widened once again. Her hesitation was immense, but for some reason, she couldn’t find the words to argue. She didn’t know why she was hesitating, but she was, and she knew that as a noble, she shouldn’t do something like that.

Just a hand forward yet. But it was the beginning. The snow soon began to melt, and so did her hesitation. She began to crawl, ever so slowly that it was barely a step forward.

She kept crawling on all fours like that, slowly picking up speed, her knees scraping on the garden stone, slowly walking forward and forward until we arrived at the clearing where the tea table could be found.

But now, with that question, an answer would form. An answer that would make her aware of her position.

But it was a gamble as well. If she realized her words, she could just as easily explode, stand up, and leave. It all depended on how deep Zara’s fetishes ran. How much they weighed on her subconscious.
